---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a public SDK, CLI, runtime, or documentation improvement
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What user workflow or integration is blocked?

## Proposal

Describe the desired behavior.

## Public docs impact

Which docs should change?

## Compatibility

Mention any expected impact on CLI commands, package extras, public APIs, or
release artifacts.

## Alternatives

List any workaround or alternative design considered.
